item.title: LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217
item.description: You can find LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217 with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO | Disney and Pixar building toy features the house from Up with balloons, Carl and Russell LEGO minifigures plus Dug LEGO dog figure This LEGO | Disney and Pixar house building set is made for endless play sessions or a colourful, eye-catching display in kids’ (or adults’!

item.title: LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151 here: ℹ️: With realistic movement and authentic features based on the original car model, the build features a working W16 engine, steering and scissor doors The Bugatti Bolide stretches the possibilities of motorsport technology; let your kids build this LEGO Technic model of the iconic racing car With yellow and black colour theme and sticker detail that adds the finishing touch, this toy car model looks great on display in kids’ rooms This LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide car toy model building set makes a great Christmas gift for boys and girls aged 9 plus and helps to introduce kids to engineering Motorsport fans and race car enthusiasts can explore the stunning design of the Bugatti Bolide with this LEGO Technic model race car building kit 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3in1 Retro Roller Skate to Mini Skateboard Toy to Boom Box Radio Set for 8 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Great Desk Decoration or Bedroom Accessories Gifts for Music Lovers 31148
item.description: You can find LEGO Creator 3in1 Retro Roller Skate to Mini Skateboard Toy to Boom Box Radio Set for 8 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Great Desk Decoration or Bedroom Accessories Gifts for Music Lovers 31148 with a discount here: ℹ️: Cool toys for 8 year old girls and boys – Kids build and rebuild 3 pop culture icons using the same bricks form LEGO Creator Retro Roller Skate toy Fun bedroom accessories – After playtime is over, all 3 LEGO retro models become an eye-catching desk decoration for kids bedrooms Movable toys – The roller skate has 4 pink rolling wheels, and the toy skateboard features 4 movable wheels for fast-paced adventure play Endless play possibilities – Kids can enjoy 3 retro models: a roller skate toy, mini skateboard toy, and boom box radio, for varied story play Birthday gifts for girls and boys aged 8+ – This 3in1 toy is a fun build-and-play experience and a cool gift for music lovers and creative kids 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Race Car Toy for Kids Boys and Girls aged 7 Plus Years Old Pull-Back Model Vehicle Set Bedroom Decoration Birthday Gift Idea 42165
item.description: You can find LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Race Car Toy for Kids Boys and Girls aged 7 Plus Years Old Pull-Back Model Vehicle Set Bedroom Decoration Birthday Gift Idea 42165 with a discount here: ℹ️: Build together – This kids’ set makes a great companion to the LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance (42171) set for adults (sold separately) so kids and adults can build together Race car toy – This LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Pull-Back car toy for 7+-year-old boys and girls has fun racing details Car racing gift idea for kids – This Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 building set makes a fun gift for 7-plus-year-old boys and girls who love cool LEGO vehicles Inspire a passion for engineering – LEGO Technic sets feature realistic movement and mechanisms to introduce LEGO builders to the engineering world Inspire role play – Kids can imagine what it’s like to be in a real racing car as they use the pull-back action to send the car toy racing along Authentic livery – Give kids a fun project as they assemble the details of this model car and add the sticker details inspired by the real-world car 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers 31137
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers 31137 at the following link: ℹ️: All of the toy dogs from the 3 different groups have posable heads, tails and ears and can fold their legs and paws to sit or stretch out Young animal lovers will love building characterful canines: beagle, poodle and labrador dog figures and role-playing caring for the toy pets For unlimited creative fun, let the little ones discover other LEGO Creator 3 in 1 sets: Vintage Motorbike (31135) and Exotic Parrot (31136) Kids can create 3 different groups of dogs with this LEGO Creator 3in1 Adorable Dogs toy building set, featuring animal figures from 7 cute breeds Each group of dogs also come with accessories such as a bowl, rubber bone, ball, hairbrush, toy rabbit or dog-walking lead to add extra fun A great treat for dog lovers and a fab gift for animal-loving kids aged 7+ years old to play with or to create fun displays in their bedrooms The toy pets can also be transformed into a miniature schnauzer and a pug, or a husky and a long-haired dachshund for hours of creative play 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3in1 Flowers in Watering Can Toy to Welly Boot to 2 Birds on a Perch Animals Set for Girls Boys & Kids with 3 Butterfly Toys Makes a Great Desk Accessory Nature Gift 31149
item.description: You can find LEGO Creator 3in1 Flowers in Watering Can Toy to Welly Boot to 2 Birds on a Perch Animals Set for Girls Boys & Kids with 3 Butterfly Toys Makes a Great Desk Accessory Nature Gift 31149 with a discount here: ℹ️: Desk accessories inspired by nature – Young creators can display these nature toys and other LEGO Creator sets to add colour to any room Nature toys for kids – With the LEGO Creator 3in1 Flowers in Watering Can set, kids 8+ can build and rebuild 3 detailed models using the same bricks Imaginative play – Kids create stories with a watering can, 3 flowers and 3 butterfly toys; a boot with flowers; or 2 LEGO birds on a perch 3in1 toy with interactive features – LEGO flowers have movable petals and butterflies on transparent sticks, creating a flying effect for extra fun Gifts for girls and boys – This 3in1 toy makes a great birthday or Christmas LEGO gift for kids aged 8+ who love animal toys and imaginative play 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack Building Toys for Kids with Speeder Bike Vehicle 4 Minifigures and 5 Figures Gifts for Boys and Girls Aged 7 Plus Years Old 75372
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack Building Toys for Kids with Speeder Bike Vehicle 4 Minifigures and 5 Figures Gifts for Boys and Girls Aged 7 Plus Years Old 75372 with a discount here: ℹ️: Unlimited creative play – This LEGO Star Wars set includes a tri-droid figure with a rotating top and 3 flick shooters, and much more Buildable LEGO Star Wars toy speeder bike for kids – The speeder bike has 2 stud shooters, 2 holders for blasters and space for 2 Clone Troopers Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack – Recreate Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes with Star Wars figures, minifigures, a speeder bike and more Star Wars vehicles and accessories – Includes a STAP speeder for a Battle Droid, a defensive post with stud shooter and a thermal detonator element 4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures and 5 figures – A Clone Shock Trooper, 3 Clone Troopers, 3 Super Battle Droids and 2 Battle Droids with accessories 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198
item.description: You can find LEGO City Cargo Train Toys for Kids Boys 7 Girls Aged 6 plus Years Old Remote Control Set Battery Powered Engine with Bluetooth Connection 3 Wagons and Tracks 60198 with a discount here: ℹ️: Also includes a control center with signal lights, toy train tracks with 16 curved rails, 16 straight rails and a railroad switch with lever Includes 6 LEGO City minifigures: 4 train workers, a security officer and a crook for imaginative role-play with this LEGO train set for kids The Cargo Train set for kids aged 6+ years old features a battery powered train toy with 4 cars, plus a control centre, armoured truck and forklift toys Includes a motorized engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control, pantograph on the opening roof, and driver’s cabin with control panel Kids can push the lever on the LEGO train track switch to drive the remote control train toy to a different track for loading or unloading LEGO City Train toys and sets with battery powered up motors (batteries not included) are a first-class Christmas or Birthday gifts for kids, boys and girls 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces here: ℹ️: The Star Wars AT-AT figure features posable legs, a posable head with opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and spring-loaded shooters Celebrate the iconic series with this Star Wars 40th Anniversary set, a LEGO brick version of the iconic AT-AT Walker Star Wars building toy This set will impress for sure when put on display, and it makes a fantastic LEGO Star Wars gift for kids, boys and girls aged 10 plus This iconic AT-AT Walker also has foldout panels, a speeder bike, winch and bottom hatch so Luke can throw in the thermal detonator element Includes 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Luke Skywalker, General Veers, 2 AT-AT Drivers and 2 Snowtroopers, all with weapons 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Ideas Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Set for Adults Collectible Vintage Model Kit to Build with Authentic Details Creative Activity Photography Gifts for Men Women Him Her & Teens 21345
item.description: You can find LEGO Ideas Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera Set for Adults Collectible Vintage Model Kit to Build with Authentic Details Creative Activity Photography Gifts for Men Women Him Her & Teens 21345 with a discount here: ℹ️: Collectible LEGO set for adults – Create your own brick-built replica of the iconic Polaroid OneStep SX-70 Camera with this LEGO set for adults LEGO camera with authentic details – This collectible set also includes a ‘Polaroid Land Camera’ sticker and choice of ‘OneStep’ or ‘1000’ stickers For camera-lovers – Design features of this model kit for adults to build include the viewfinder, Colour Spectrum and exposure compensation dial Operates like a real vintage Polaroid camera model – Load one of the ‘photos’ into the camera and press the red shutter button to eject it Buildable Time-Zero Land Film pack – Contains 3 illustrated ‘photos’ of Polaroid inventor Edwin H.

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hagrid’s Hut: An Unexpected Visit Toy House for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls Includes Dragon and Dog Figures plus 5 Character Minifigures Hermione & Ron Gift Idea 76428

item.title: LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Centre Vet Set Animal Care Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls and Boys with Otter Seahorse and Turtle Figures 41736
item.description: You can find LEGO Friends Sea Rescue Centre Vet Set Animal Care Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls and Boys with Otter Seahorse and Turtle Figures 41736 with a discount here: ℹ️: After rescue missions kids turn the knob to push animals down the slide to the building toy rehabilition area until they can return to the ocean Animal-lovers discover the ocean and learn to take care of otters and other toy sea animals with this LEGO Friends Sea Rescue vet set for kids This set makes a great gift for kids, girls, boys 7+ years old; plus, LEGO Builder app lets zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress The playset includes a 3-level building with radar, wind turbine and a slide, a water scooter, a rehabilitation area and LEGO ocean scene Includes accessories: a life jacket, brush, feeding bottle, walkie-talkie, treasure chest, camera, microscope, syringe and an X-ray machine Kids can rescue and care for the sea otters using the water scooter then head inside to clean, X-ray and feed the otter animal figures This vet toy comes with Leo, Kayla and animal-loving Autumn mini-dolls, plus toy animals; 2 sea otters, a seahorse and a sea turtle figures 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Architecture Notre-Dame de Paris Set Model Kit for Adults to Build Home or Office Décor Collectible Gift for Lovers of History Men Women Him or Her 21061
item.description: You can find LEGO Architecture Notre-Dame de Paris Set Model Kit for Adults to Build Home or Office Décor Collectible Gift for Lovers of History Men Women Him or Her 21061 with a discount here: ℹ️: Step-by-step guide – The included instruction booklet features the Notre-Dame story and an interview with the LEGO designer of this model Authentically detailed – Admire the rose windows, remove the roof to view interior columns and arches and lift off the towers to take a look inside LEGO Paris set – Your building journey follows that of the actual Notre-Dame cathedral, starting with its curved back and ending with the spire LEGO gift for adults – This collectible LEGO Paris set makes a fun Christmas gift for men, women, him, her, or a friend who is a lover of history, architecture, travel or France LEGO Sets for Adults – This LEGO Architecture Landmarks Collection model is part of an assortment of premium-quality building sets for adults like you who enjoy hands-on creative activities Notre-Dame de Paris model – Experience every step in the evolution of an iconic Paris landmark with this LEGO Architecture building set for adults Paris decorations for home or office décor – Place buildable trees along one side of the cathedral and attach the nameplate to the base 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Building Set Collectible Gift For Men & Women 42154
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic 2022 Ford GT Car Model Kit for Adults to Build 1:12 Scale Supercar with Authentic Features Advanced Building Set Collectible Gift For Men & Women 42154 here: ℹ️: Take your time assembling details like the rear-wheel drive with differential, opening doors, adjustable spoiler wing and opening bonnet With its classic dark blue finish with white racing stripes, this LEGO Technic model car kit for adults makes a stunning display piece Part of an innovative collection of LEGO model car kits for adults to build, this set includes the LEGO Builder app with digital instructions Number of Pieces: 1,466 This LEGO supercar model is designed for adult builders, offering a detailed building project, and makes a great gift for men and women to add to their LEGO vehicle collection Enjoy a rewarding building experience shaping every detail of the 2022 Ford GT with this 1:12 scale LEGO Technic car model kit for adults The model car includes authentic features, such as a V6 engine with moving pistons, independent suspension on all wheels and front-axle steering 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre Modular Building Set Toy Birthday Gift Idea for Kids Girls Boys with Art and Recording Studios Gaming Room plus Pickle the Dog and More 41748 at the following link: ℹ️: Includes a music room, recording studio, chill out zone, art studio, pool and greenhouse, plus slide and platform to move from one floor to another The model building kit includes lots of toy art, a sewing machine, music, gardening and gaming accessories so kids can create their own scenes Includes LEGO Friends Paisley, Liann, Olly, Nova, Zac mini-dolls and Pickle the dog, plus Stephanie, one of the original characters, who became Heartlake City mayor The modular style of this building toy lets kids arrange the various levels to create their own design, then switch it up whenever they want The construction toy features a crane to access the side of the building for kids to work on the mural, plus a stage with a dancing function This LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Centre modular building set features 5 floors, each with different areas for kids to explore Expand the fun: This set combines with the LEGO Friends Heartlake City Community Kitchen 41747 (sold separately) for even bigger stories 🛒 Check the deal!

C-3PO Birthday Gift for Kids and Fans 75389 with a discount here: ℹ️: Collectible building toys for all ages – LEGO Star Wars sets enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to recreate classic scenes, create their own adventures or simply display the buildable models LEGO vehicle – Features a removable cockpit for 2 minifigures, spring-loaded shooters, cannons, a gunner post for 2 minifigures and a radar dish Easy access – Flip up the top panels to reveal the interior, which includes a removable throne for Darth Jar Jar, command centre, hyperdrive and more LEGO Star Wars building toy for kids – The Dark Falcon, a dark version of the Millennium Falcon as seen in the Rebuild the Galaxy Disney+ special Part of the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy collection – Look out for 75388 Jedi Bob’s Starfighter and 75393 TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-up sets, sold separately 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Darth Jar Jar, Bounty Hunter C-3PO, Darth Dev, Darth Rey, Beach Luke and Jedi Vader, plus lightsabers and more Fun Star Wars gift for kids – This LEGO Star Wars Starship set makes a great birthday gift for 10-plus-year-old boys, girls and Star Wars fans 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line Building Set Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible 4X4 Off-Road Vehicle Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42177
item.description: You can find LEGO Technic Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line Building Set Model Car Kit for Adults to Build Collectible 4X4 Off-Road Vehicle Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42177 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Technic set – Celebrate the 45th anniversary of one of the world’s best-loved off-roaders with this Mercedes-Benz G 500 PROFESSIONAL Line model Functions to explore – Check out the 6-cylinder in-line piston engine, gearbox with its drive, neutral and reverse settings and 2 differential locks Build a G-Class model car – This model kit for adults to build includes authentic features, such as the working steering and the raised suspension Detailed LEGO vehicle – This set for adults features opening doors, a ladder, spare wheel and a roof rack, plus an opening tailgate and bonnet A Mercedes-Benz collectible car gift – This LEGO Technic set makes a great gift idea for men and women, including adult LEGO builders and Mercedes-Benz fans with a project to enjoy and a display piece to cherish Engaging building instructions – Get ready to build like never before with the LEGO Builder app, where you can save sets and track your progress 🛒 Buy it!
